name: Where Food Comes From, Inc.
business: Where Food Comes From, Inc. is a leading third-party verification provider for food production practices, offering verification and certification services, product sales (cattle identification ear tags), and professional consulting services. The company serves farmers, ranchers, processors, retailers, and other participants in the food supply chain.
sellsTo: farmers, ranchers, vineyards, wineries, processors, retailers, distributors, trade associations, consumer brands, chefs and restaurants
beef, lamb, pork, poultry, fish, dairy, eggs, fresh produce, nuts and grains, wine and finished products
U.S. beef and pork packers, organic producers and processors, specialty retail chains

exposures.sentence: The Company's principal business is conducting both on-site and desk audits to verify that claims being made about livestock, aquaculture, crops and other food products are accurate.
